subject: feat(theme): switch to caramellatte (light) and coffee (dark) themes
body:
Warm, cozy aesthetic — caramellatte uses cream/brown tones for light mode,
coffee uses dark mauve/amber for dark mode. Both are DaisyUI preset themes.

Updated data-theme values in flash-prevention scripts (both HTML files),
theme.js, and main.css @plugin config.

Tags: theme, daisyui, ui
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: css-framework-migration
Semver: minor
